spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the relevant API surface (document.querySelector, translate() with runtime script (~6681 chars) wired to live controls, in line with the feature summary.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive surface — 4 buttons, 5 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges — wired up via event listeners.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept lede matches the feature-index promise on key terms (benchmark, preview, sethtmlunsafe, template, toggle).

edge_cases.rationale: Some failure / fallback handling shown (4 hits), but the demo skews toward the happy path and doesn't surface most edge cases the spec calls out.

references.rationale: ChromeStatus link is present but the page has no dedicated `references` section — the self-heal contract is fragile.

design_system.rationale: All colours come via 136 CSS-variable references, no raw hex, no button background override without a colour override, and not a static-card pattern.

openQuestions.title: Demo at least one explicit failure or edge case
openQuestions.detail: Spec / chromestatus motivation mentions failure modes worth showing — permission denial, missing-feature, empty input, malformed payload. Add a control or scripted scenario that walks the user through one and shows the resulting error or fallback.

openQuestions.title: Wrap references in a labelled `references` section
openQuestions.detail: Per CLAUDE.md rule #3, the chromestatus link is the self-heal anchor and should sit inside a clearly-labelled `references` section so the recovery script can find it reliably.

openQuestions.title: Manually verify against the spec text
openQuestions.detail: Reviewer-v1-subagent based the spec_match verdict on the chromestatus summary ("Expose multiple HTML setting methods that provide a coherent story for dynamically inserting markup into an existing document.  - Positional methods (before/after/append/prepend/replaceWith) that take HTML as argument, effectively replacing") because reading the full spec for every concept was out of budget. A human or follow-up agent should diff the demo's actual behaviour against https://github.com/WICG/declarative-partial-updates/blob/main/dynamic-markup-revamped-explainer.md#resulting-api to catch anything chromestatus glossed over.

summary: Concept ships ~6681 chars of script across 4 button(s) and 5 other control(s). hits 4 pass / 2 partial across the six rubric criteria with no outright fails.
